scripts.sbom: cargo cyclonedx --manifest-path Cargo.toml --format json --override-filename cyclonedx-rs --spec-version 1.5 --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p sbom && mv cyclonedx-rs.json sbom/ && npx @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm --output-file sbom/cyclonedx-npm.json && node scripts/generate-cbom.mjs
